steps.title: Set up the percentage calculation
steps.content: We need to find what 6% of 250 equals. Using the percentage formula, we identify: percent = 6%, whole = 250 trees.

steps.title: Calculate the number of birch trees
steps.content:
Number of birch trees = $\frac{6}{100} \times 250$. Simplify:
$$\frac{6 \times 250}{100} = \frac{1500}{100} = 15$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
